aboutDesc: Final-year Informatics Student (GPA 3.92) with strong analytical skills proved by multiple Competitive Programming awards. Experienced in Fullstack Development with a keen interest in Backend Systems, API Development, and Cloud Architecture. Proficient in Python, PHP, and Javascript, with a strong willingness to adapt to new technologies.
contactDesc: Have a project in mind or just want to chat? I'm always open to discussing new opportunities and ideas.
getInTouchText: I'm currently available for freelance projects and full-time opportunities. If you have a question or just want to say hi, I'll try my best to get back to you!
